features.name: Project Setup
features.description: Confirm the project can install dependencies, run verification, and start from a clean checkout.

features.name: sobench: Package Skeleton — Models + Workspace
features.description: 15 artifact dataclasses (from_dict/to_dict/validate, identity fields task/method/case) and Workspace class (path resolution root/task/case/method, artifact I/O, read_blocker, blocked property). Pure-Python, no LLM. Tests: tests/test_models.py, tests/test_workspace.py.
features.evidence: 2026-06-19: 44 tests pass (43 new + 1 smoke); ./init.sh clean. 14 dataclasses, Workspace class, TDD cycle completed.

features.name: sobench: LLM Wrapper
features.description: sobench/llm.py: complete(prompt, system="") -> str over an OpenAI-compatible endpoint, config from .env via python-dotenv (OPENAI_BASE_URL/OPENAI_MODEL_NAME/OPENAI_API_KEY). Real-LLM test over real data/ inputs; skip with explicit reason if .env config absent.

features.name: sobench: CLI + Scaffold Subcommand
features.description: sobench/cli.py (argparse, 4 subcommands) + sobench/__main__.py. scaffold creates workspaces/T/C/M/ and writes benchmark_intent.md template; run/check/report are stubs. Tests: tests/test_cli.py.

features.name: sobench: Steps s01–s04
features.description: s01 ensure_workspace (raises if missing), s02 parse_intent (LLM, blocker if task/method unparseable), s03 extract_paper_evidence (PDF text + LLM, blocker if paper absent), s04 inspect_repo_evidence (walk repo + LLM, never blocks). Real-task tests over data/spatial_domain_identification_task; LLM steps skip if no key.

features.name: sobench: Steps s05–s08
features.description: s05 build_data_manifest (real Path.exists, never blocks), s06 draft_task_spec (blocker if no context), s07 draft_evaluation_contract (metric.resolved:false valid), s08 draft_risk_audit (always writes). Real-task tests; LLM steps skip if no key.

features.name: sobench: Step s09 — Execute or Block
features.description: Feasibility check; subprocess exec when feasible; always writes blocker.json + execution_log.json (status not_attempted when blocked). Primary real path is blocked (DLPFC .h5ad genuinely absent under data/). Feasible path skips with reason if the real command cannot run here.

features.name: sobench: Steps s10–s12
features.description: s10 record_raw_observations, s11 audit_result_validity, s12 write_interpretation. s10/s11/s12 skip when workspace.blocked; s12 additionally runs when execution attempted but result invalid (benchmark_result_claimed:false). Real-task tests.

features.name: sobench: Steps s13–s14
features.description: s13 write_experience_record (always runs, status=hypothesis, captures blocker learning), s14 structural_check (pure Python; passed:false only when missing_unacknowledged non-empty; blocker excuses s10/s11/s12). s13 real-LLM test skips if no key; s14 pure-Python.

features.name: sobench: Runner + CLI run/check/report
features.description: runner.py calls all 14 steps in order with SKIP_WHEN_BLOCKED (s10/s11/s12 skip when blocked; s13/s14 always run). Wire run/check/report into CLI. Tests verify skip logic and ordering against the real task.
features.evidence: 2026-06-19: runner.py implemented (STEPS s01→s14, SKIP_WHEN_BLOCKED, returns executed list). CLI stubs replaced with real run/check/report. 4 runner tests pass (3 static + 1 real blocked pipeline, 2:28); 15 CLI tests pass (14 non-LLM + 1 real run, 2:14). python -m compileall clean. 96 tests collected.

features.name: sobench: Integration Smoke Test (real task)
features.description: End-to-end real-task test: intent fixture derived from data/ (provenance header, real paper/repo paths), real LLM, real blocked cycle (no .h5ad). Asserts structural_check passed:true, experience_record status=hypothesis with real evidence refs, blocker blocked:true with real reason, execution_log status=not_attempted. Skips with explicit reason if no key or real data absent.
